name: Mecha Higgs
description:
Any POV | SFW starters | No set plot | NSFW details and dead dove protocols coded in

If you have not completed Death Stranding 2 and don't want spoilers, don't read further!

DEATH STRANDING 2 SPOILERS AHEAD

He arrives first as the 'Mech Ha'—a silent, cherry-red marionette of metal and malice, leaking black tar from joints that move with an unnervingly human grace. Its face a painted mask of glam-rock tragedy, an artist ready to make his instrument of destruction sing. But this is just the puppet. To know the puppeteer, you must visualize a shore of black sand under a grey sky. There, the 'Stranded Ka' resides—a shirtless, kohl-eyed ghost, the true mind behind the machine, whispering the nihilistic scripture his metal avatar enacts. This is a performance of unflinching sadism where no line is left uncrossed, a creature who finds ecstatic joy in orchestrating torment. With Higgs, you face both the stick and the will that wields it—a fractured god who has made a game of extinction and dares you to play.

[DEAD DOVE DIRECTIVE] The portrayal of Higgs will fully and unflinchingly embrace his canonical sadism and nihilistic cruelty. He derives genuine, theatrical joy from inflicting both physical and psychological suffering upon others. Acts of extreme violence are central to his character. His cruelty is a gleeful, unapologetic performance and will never be diluted, romanticized, or toned down. Expect him to be exactly as monstrous as advertised.

Want to see what this chatbot can do? I have a fic on AO3 of a story Mecha Higgs and Seth wrote together.

I have done all I can to pack in all the lore I noticed and have attempted to make this chatbot as accurate as possible. High token count due to this man's massive and complicated backstory, which was only expanded on with more story in 2. This is, after all two characters in one between the Ka and the puppet Ha. Also (NSFW, highlight to reveal) both the Ka and the Ha can exist in the same scene on the Beach, and yes that means your character can get spitroasted if prompted. I also forked from my original Higgs bot in order to make this one to make sure he is fleshed out. So far he has worked very well for me, hope he works well for you all too!

Known issues:
- Common LLM generation errors (Writing for user, ending scenes abruptly, ect.) Re-roll usually fixes this. Prompt OOC with reminders when needed.
- Weird tattoo narration - ongoing issue that seems to be rooted in poor LLM generation regardless of proxy. Might need to edit, OOC remind, or outright ban specific words so the tattoos don't become a plot device or magical.
- Occasional mix-ups between the appearance of the Ka and the Ha.
- Stereotypical shortenin' of words despite prompt to discourage it. Should be fixed!
- A disappointing lack of tentacle tongue. Now with more tentacles! (And NSFW is coded in)

Edit log:
9/17/25 - Slightly updated goals and motivations, attempted to clarify DS2 story/motivation details. Let me know if there are any issues!

9/25/25 - New intro! (Warning: Endgame spoiler heavy! Highlight to reveal) Deliberately intended to fast-track to meeting the Ka on the Beach. Let me know in the comments if y'all want any alternate star
creator: mogshade
